summary: Completed GraphRAG Level 1 + Level 2 testing for SwarmSim. All 24 backend unit tests passed (100%). All 17 frontend UI tests passed. Backend: graph_agent functions (process_graph_response, strip_runtime_fields, ensure_indices, retrieve_graph_context, build_agent_generation_context, generate_report_context) all work correctly. Frontend: loads without errors, shows Grok Active badge, System Online badge, all 5 step indicators, mode toggle, topic input, prediction horizons, upload dropzone, terminal logs.
passed_tests: POST /api/sessions creates a session with UUID
graph_agent.process_graph_response() normalizes old source/target format to source_id/target_id
graph_agent.strip_runtime_fields() keeps core data (entities, relationships, themes, etc.)
graph_agent.ensure_indices() rebuilds entity_index and adjacency_map from stripped graph
graph_agent.retrieve_graph_context() returns relevant context string for an agent
graph_agent.retrieve_graph_context() includes entities mentioned in recent posts
graph_agent.generate_report_context() returns context string with high-importance entities
Session stores graph stats after creation
Frontend mode toggle (Document Upload / Live Intelligence) works
Frontend shows 4 info cards in sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: GraphRAG L1 extraction prompt correctly requests uncapped entities with importance levels, key_tensions, prediction_hooks, agent_diversity_hints
process_graph_response() correctly normalizes both source/target and source_id/target_id relationship formats
strip_runtime_fields() properly removes heavy indices (entity_index, adjacency_map) while preserving counts for API responses
ensure_indices() correctly rebuilds indices after loading from MongoDB (called in orchestrator.py)
retrieve_graph_context() implements proper L2 per-agent retrieval based on importance, occupation, and recent post mentions
Frontend ENTITY_COLORS handles all new entity types (Person, Organization, Country, Company, Policy, Law, Metric, Asset, Instrument, Location)
Frontend graph visualization handles both source_id/target_id and source/target relationship formats
Frontend shows HIGH importance badge on high-importance entities
Frontend sizes nodes by importance (High=14, Medium=10, Low=6)
Frontend shows entity type breakdown with colored dots
seed_data_creation: Used mock graph data for unit tests (no LLM calls needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GraphRAG L1+L2 fully verified. Backend graph_agent functions all work correctly with mock data. Frontend handles new graph fields (entity_count, relationship_count, importance, source_id/target_id). All 24 backend tests and 17 frontend tests passed. No issues found.

rca_of_the_issue.verification: Verified via pytest backend unit tests and Playwright UI tests

features_verified.session_creation: VERIFIED - POST /api/sessions creates session with UUID
features_verified.ensure_indices_rebuilds: VERIFIED - Rebuilds indices from stripped graph
features_verified.build_agent_generation_context: VERIFIED - Returns rich context with themes, tensions, diversity hints
features_verified.generate_report_context: VERIFIED - Returns context with high-importance entities and tensions
features_verified.frontend_graph_source_id_target_id: VERIFIED - Handles both source_id/target_id and source/target formats
features_verified.frontend_entity_type_breakdown: VERIFIED - Shows entity type breakdown with colored dots
features_verified.frontend_high_importance_badge: VERIFIED - Shows HIGH badge on high-importance entities
